text: Tell me a short story about a robot who learns to paint.
Explain quantum entanglement in simple terms.
List 5 unusual uses for a paperclip.
What would happen if gravity suddenly became 10% weaker?
Describe the taste of water to someone who has never tasted anything.
Name 7 animals that start with the letter K.
Write a haiku about debugging code.
Explain why the sky is blue to a 5-year-old.
Give me a recipe for a meal using only eggs, rice, and soy sauce.
What are 3 arguments for and 3 against remote work?
Invent a word and define it.
Explain the difference between a virus and a bacterium.
Describe what a sunset looks like from the surface of Mars.
List the planets of the solar system in order from the Sun.
Write a limerick about a programmer.
What came first, the chicken or the egg? Give a biological answer.
Name 10 words that are their own antonyms (contronyms).
Explain how a refrigerator works.
Write a dialogue between a cat and a dog meeting for the first time.
What are the pros and cons of nuclear energy?
Describe the color blue to a blind person.
List 5 historical events that happened on March 15.
Write a tweet-length summary of World War II.
Explain what a blockchain is without using technical jargon.
Generate a random D&D character: race, class, background, and one personality trait.
What would you name a coffee shop on the Moon?
Explain the trolley problem and give your analysis.
List 8 things you can do with a brick besides building.
Write an acrostic poem where the first letters spell PYTHON.
Explain how GPS works in 3 sentences.
Describe the internet to someone from the year 1900.
What are 5 cognitive biases that affect decision-making?
Write a fortune cookie message.
Explain the Monty Hall problem and the correct strategy.
If you could add one amendment to the US Constitution, what would it be and why?
List all the US states that border the Pacific Ocean.
Write a one-paragraph pitch for a startup that sells AI-generated perfumes.
Explain the difference between machine learning, deep learning, and AI.
Name 6 foods that are technically berries (that most people don't realize).
What are 4 things that would be different if humans had evolved with tails?
Write instructions for making a peanut butter and jelly sandwich so precisely that a robot could follow them.
Generate 5 band names that don't exist yet.
Explain what causes deja vu.
List the 5 largest deserts in the world by area.
Write a review of a restaurant that only serves food from the year 2200.
Explain why we dream.
What are 3 things that are true about octopuses that sound made up?
Generate a plot summary for a movie where time runs backwards.
Explain the ship of Theseus paradox.
List 5 inventions that were discovered by accident.
